label: Cisco Jokes
description: Dry networking jokes for routing days, Cisco titles, and suspiciously confident victory laps.
quotes:
Smart Licensing has entered the room.
Morale has left.
This feels like the part where Cisco says the feature is supported in spirit.

I respect the CLI.
I do not respect what the licensing portal is doing.
Somewhere a Catalyst is blinking like it knows what you changed.

Meraki dashboard moment.
Hope you enjoy waiting confidently.

The config is fine.
The part that is on fire is everything around the config.
ASA rule logic has become an interpretive art form.
Packet Tracer confidence is not production confidence.

If Firepower wanted me relaxed,
it picked a strange strategy.

ISE is asking for another step.
That seems on brand.
This routing table has strong 'we'll circle back' energy.
I can smell a mismatched native VLAN from here.
The switch stack is either healthy or acting healthy for management.
Today's Cisco joke is that the docs said 'simple.'

quotes.text:
I saw '{title}'.
That is absolutely a Cisco situation.
'{title}' sounds like something that will ask for another reboot.
